articles.title: Gill 104 trumps Sooryavanshi 96 as GT enter IPL final
articles.description: While Sooryavanshi played an almost lone hand for RR, GT had Gill and Sai Sudharsan firing at both ends

articles.title: Tickner five-for wraps up innings win for New Zealand
articles.description: Fifties from Doheny and Tucker couldn't prevent Ireland from slumping to defeat inside three days

articles.title: McCullum refreshed and 'keen to finish job we started' with England
articles.description: Head coach wants "refinement" of Test approach after being backed by ECB following Ashes debacle

articles.title: Shaheen Afridi on Pakistan quicks losing speed: 'Machines deteriorate with time'
articles.description: Afridi said Rizwan's omission from the ODIs against Australia was to give youngsters chance ahead of the 2027 ODI World Cup

articles.title: Rishabh Pant steps down as LSG captain
articles.description: Decision taken after Lucknow Super Giants finished last in IPL 2026; they had finished seventh under his leadership in 2025

articles.title: Babar returns while understrength Australia look to 2027 and beyond
articles.description: Some familiar names return for Pakistan while Australia have fresh faces in the absence of a number of frontline stars

articles.title: Munisar replaces Brathwaite as West Indies name T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: The same squad will face Ireland and Pakistan in a tri-nation T20I series, which got underway on May 28

articles.title: West Indies to host Sri Lanka, New Zealand and Pakistan in 2026 home season
articles.description: West Indies will play Test matches against Sri Lanka and Pakistan in the home season

articles.title: World Cup contenders England and India hope to get their combinations right
articles.description: England will want time in the middle for the new opening pair of Sophia Dunkley and Alice Capsey, while India will want a repeat of the historic first T20I series win in England last year

articles.title: Marsh out of Pakistan series with ankle injury, Inglis to captain
articles.description: Stand-in skipper Marsh has been withdrawn due to an ankle injury with his availability for the Bangladesh tour to be determined

articles.title: Zimbabwe to host South Africa Women for first-ever bilateral white-ball series
articles.description: The series is set to be played at the Queens Sports Club.

articles.title: IPL introduces stricter measures against use of smart glasses during live matches
articles.description: These smart devices were flagged due to their capability of live-streaming, sending text messages, and making audio and video calls through mobile data or Wi-Fi networks.

articles.title: 'Mentally stressed and completely exhausted' - Source reveals reason behind Hardik Pandya's ouster from Mumbai Indians
articles.description: According to a media report, Pandya had informed the Mumbai Indians management midway through the season that he was considering stepping away from the franchise.
